title: Champagne Clay Studio
visual_concept: Soft handcrafted mineral surfaces create a refined and contemporary activewear presentation.
background_description: Smooth champagne-toned clay plaster wall with subtle tonal variation, warm ivory matte floor, seamless wall-to-floor transition, extremely low-contrast texture, large negative space surrounding the product, soft diffused overhead lighting, gentle contact shadows, slight environmental depth of field, premium ecommerce catalog aesthetic.
